## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Linked Issue

Closes #<issue-number>

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran lint locally (`npm run lint`).
- [ ] I ran tests locally (`npm test` or equivalent).
- [ ] I updated docs/comments where needed.
- [ ] I assessed environment/config impact.
- [ ] I verified no secrets were added.

## Environment Impact

- [ ] No environment changes
- [ ] Environment variables updated
- [ ] Infrastructure/workflow config updated

Details:

## Deployment Considerations

- [ ] No special deployment steps required
- [ ] Deployment requires coordination
- [ ] Rollback plan documented
